mapper.sql: id, dept_code, dept_name, region, parent_id, sort_order, status, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_department ( dept_code, dept_name, region, parent_id, sort_order, status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{region}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_department
dept_name = #{deptName},
region = #{region},
parent_id = #{parentId},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
status = #{status},
version = version + 1,
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
